question_text:
In commit 1fe8a85 on 2026-07-10, you wrote line 29 of gradebook/analytics.py:
29:     if p > 100:

Consider changing `p > 100` to `p >= 100`.

For an input exactly equal to 100.0, what observable difference in `clamp_percent`’s returned value results from changing `p > 100` to `p >= 100`, and why?
